Localization.Description: Attempt to assign an external address to a virtual machine or unassign it from a virtual machine

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} unassigned an external address from virtual machine {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to unassign an external address from virtual machine {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to assign an external address to virtual machine {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is assigning an external address to virtual machine {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} assigned an external address to virtual machine {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unassigning an external address from virtual machine {datafield5} on host {event_src.host}
